search_hint: Type text to search for here
error_converting_tape_file: Error converting tape to the sound file.
invalid_file_format: Invalid file format. The app supports %s files only.
download_tape_success: Tape saved to your Downloads folder.
tape_corrupted_warning: This tape file appears to be corrupted. Playback may be incomplete.
tip_carousel_body: Swipe the file-name strip left or right to switch between alternative dumps and multi-tape parts of the same release. The dots beneath show how many versions are available and which one is selected.
tip_download_body: Long-press the file name to copy the current tape to your device's Downloads folder, ready to use elsewhere.
tip_blocks_body: Tap the list icon below the transport controls to view every block of the tape (header, loader, code, screen, data) and jump straight to any of them.
tip_block_transport_body: Use the previous and next arrows to jump between tape blocks; the restart button rewinds to the start of the block that's currently playing.
tip_stop_body: The Stop button stops playback and rewinds to the very beginning of the tape, ready for the next load.
tip_speed_body: Tap the speed badge (e.g. 1.00x) to adjust playback speed. Pitch follows the speed naturally, just like a real tape recorder, and the presets cover the most useful loading-speed tweaks.
